_note: Recent (2026 Q2) post-training techniques shelf. Maturity is honest: LoRA/QLoRA/GRPO/DPO/on-policy-distillation are the ESTABLISHED core (default recommendations). The 2026 items below are mostly single-paper/experimental — shown as an 'explore' shelf, NOT as defaults. Every entry has a real URL. Headline truth: nothing displaced LoRA/QLoRA in the last 3 months; the real 2026 change is engineering maturity (TRL v1.0) and distillation pipelining.

established.name: TRL v1.0
established.note: 2026-03, 75+ trainer 프로덕션 API — 알고리즘 아닌 성숙

emerging_2026.name: On-policy distillation
emerging_2026.what: student rollout + live teacher 교정, full RL보다 싸고 exposure-bias 해소

emerging_2026.name: TRL DistillationTrainer
emerging_2026.what: generation buffer(최대 40x)·외부 teacher 서버·binary logprob — prompts만으로 live 증류

emerging_2026.name: MatryoshkaLoRA
emerging_2026.what: 한 어댑터가 여러 sub-rank 제공 → 재학습 없이 추론 시 rank 선택

emerging_2026.name: IGU-LoRA
emerging_2026.what: 층별 적응 rank(Integrated Gradients+불확실성) — 균일 rank보다 우수

emerging_2026.name: Dynamic-pruning GRPO
emerging_2026.what: 저가치 rollout을 RL 중 가지치기(importance-sampling 보정)

emerging_2026.name: LongAct
emerging_2026.what: 장문맥 추론 RL을 activation 패턴으로(RoPE 스케일링 너머)

emerging_2026.name: LongAttnComp
emerging_2026.when: 추론 모델에 넣는 유효 context 축소
